nasb.text: Sing for joy and be glad, O daughter of Zion; for behold I am coming and I will dwell in your midst,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion, for behold, I come and I will dwell in your midst, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “錫安的居民哪！你們要歡呼快樂，因為我要來住在你們中間。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“锡安城啊，高声欢唱吧！因为我要来住在你里面。”
